content:
4️⃣ Weekly Film Voting System

📜 Student-Driven Film Selection Process
1. Week 10:
• Students submit film recommendations that fit the themes for Weeks 11-12.
• Must include justification for how it connects.
2. Week 11:
• Students vote by liking the film suggestions on the discussion board.
• The two most popular films are selected.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages engagement in choosing course materials.
• Ensures films resonate with student interests.

5️⃣ “Earning Back” Participation for Mastery Challenge Students

📜 New Solution: The Redemption Option

If students take the Mastery Exam Challenge and do not pass, they can:
• Complete an in-depth self-reflection on their exam performance.
• Propose an alternative way to demonstrate knowledge (e.g., additional research, a short essay).
